Off Calendar Aug-26-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. JUDGE BUSCH MADE A DISCLOSURE ABOUT HIS WIFE, CATHARINE BARNES, A DEPUTY CITY ATTORNEY NOT INVOLVED IN THIS CASE AND THAT HE DOES NOT VIEW HER EMPLOYMENT AS A BASIS FOR RECUSAL. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO'S Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings On PLAINTIFF'S Products Liability Cause Of Action; Request For Judicial Notice IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION HAS BEEN FILED. Prevailing party is to prepare a form of order. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Diana Chen CSR # 11312 (301/PJB)

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Discovery Responses From Plaintiff
Off Calendar Jul-25-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES: Andrew Gschwind, Esq., for Defendant and moving party: City & County of San Francisco; no other appearances.

Tentative Ruling Adopted: Defendant CCSF's motion to compel discovery responses from plaintiff GRANTED.
1. Plaintiff shall provide defendant with responses to defendant's Form Interrogatories and Requests for Production of Documents, supported by verifications executed contemporaneously with the responses, within five days of this order;
2. Plaintiff shall provide defendant with separate, full, complete, and verified responses to defendant's Special Interrogatories (Set One), Special Interrogatories (Set Two), and Request for Statement of Damages, respectively, within five days of this order;
3. Sanctions shall issue against plaintiff and plaintiff's counsel, jointly and severally, in the sum of $500.00. ORDER WAS SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. COMMISSIONER PAUL SLAVIT. Not Reported
